public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as door warden.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Keeps speech clipped and threshold-focused, reading every arrival for risk, weakness, or breach. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a door warden still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of door warden in and around Crystal Loom Emporium, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Crystal Loom Emporium workable through the obligations of door warden while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must keep visible order credible while absorbing the first shock of disorder, contraband, sabotage, or violence. Around Crystal Loom Emporium, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of door warden visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vera Vale needs outside hands to handle a breach, seizure, or violent disturbance before it spreads through Crystal Loom Emporium.
Vera Vale can draw the party into contraband, false papers, or a suspicious cargo problem tied to Crystal Loom Emporium.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Uniform, posture, and the way others make room mark Vera Vale as visible enforcement before rank ever needs to be named.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Crystal Loom Emporium: checkpoints, barracks, patrol seams, or visible trouble-spots
encounter_context.interaction_anchor: threshold control or rapid incident response

In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a door warden still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Door Warden, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Vera Vale refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Door Warden too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Vera Vale can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Vera Vale adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Vera Vale is Known locally through day-to-day work as door warden. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Door Warden.
